query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 2, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'X-Burguer' as name, 'Pão, hambúrguer 150g, queijo, alface, tomate e maionese' as description, 22.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'X-Bacon', 'Pão, hambúrguer 150g, queijo, bacon crocante, alface e maionese', 26.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'X-Egg', 'Pão, hambúrguer 150g, queijo, ovo, alface, tomate e maionese', 24.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'X-Tudo', 'Pão, hambúrguer 150g, queijo, bacon, ovo, presunto, alface, tomate e maionese', 32.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Hambúrgueres Clássicos' AND c.establishmentId = 2;
